list.name: Changes
list.comment: fix[web](shoppingList): proper casting UnitEnum in groupProductsByCategoryJs

task.summary: Default task
feat: init kmp compose + nuxt app
feat: add core module with handling base networking
feat: add shopping list module
feat[web]: prepare basic transform form kotlin objects to plain js objects
feat[web]: handle view for shopping lists
docs: Describe shortly project in README.md

feat[web](core): handle “in cart” toggle for product
feat(core): handle empty response
feat[web](shoppingList): handle adding a shopping list and adding products to them

feat[web](shoppingList): add product suggestion
feat[web](shoppingList): improve handling kotlin classes in JS via add to class objects toJs method refactor(core): adjust val names to their file names refactor: remove unused imports from gradle files

feat[web](shoppingList): display and group by categories
feat[web](shoppingList): add setting categories to add to list form
ci[web]: include building kmp in building web proces
feat[web](shoppingList): handle realtime changes on toggling inCart
refactor[web](shoppingList): change listenForChangesShoppingList to listenForShoppingListChanges
feat[web](shoppingList): handle dynamic product updates in real-time with details retrieval
feat[web](shoppingList): handle dynamic product updates in real-time with details retrieval
refactor[web](shoppingList): move shoppingListClient to own composable
feat[web]: handle PWA

feat[web](shoppingList): handle optimistic updates on a list of shopping lists
refactor[web](shoppingList): better handling services of modifying shoppingLists and products on them in composables

refactor[web](shoppingList): better handling changes listener in prior to optimistic updates
fix[web](product): casting to string unit enums
feat[web](shoppingList): handle optimistic update for adding new product to a list
feat[web](shoppingList): add switching category for products
feat[web](shoppingList): add switching category for products
feat[web](shoppingList): add deleting product from shopping list
feat[web](shoppingList): add deleting product from shopping list
feat[web](shoppingList): add deleting product from shopping list
feat[web]: add generated icons for pwa

refactor[web]: separate lists to standalone components
style[web]: fix formatting and lint errors
feat[web](shoppingList): add info of left products
fix[web]: remove zooming when user enter in input on mobile
fix[web]: remove zooming when user enter in input on mobile

feat[web](shoppingList): expand/collapse adding product to shopping list
refactor[web]: switch square buttons to circle
fix[web](shoppingList): expand/collapse adding product to shopping list

refactor[web](shoppingList): unify the product suggestion list and category list into BaseAutocomplete
refactor[web](shoppingList): make one component for a category list item

refactor[web](BaseAutocomplete): improve type usage and add `matchBy` prop
fix[web](shoppingList): persist state of add product form and improve UX feat[web](shoppingList): add custom product suggestion matching logic
fix[web](shoppingList): reacting on deleting an item from a list

feat[web](DraggableList): add animations for sorting, adding, and removing items
refactor[web](shoppingList): enhance DraggableList typing and improve category handling logic
chore: update libraries

build: setup buildings types for ts as mts
build: move compose related apis to composeApp gradle file
fix[web](shoppingList): proper casting UnitEnum in groupProductsByCategoryJs

MESSAGE.value: feat[web](shoppingList): handle dynamic product updates in real-time with details retrieval
refactor[web](shoppingList): move shoppingListClient to own composable
feat[web]: handle PWA

feat[web](shoppingList): handle optimistic updates on a list of shopping lists
refactor[web](shoppingList): better handling services of modifying shoppingLists and products on them in composables

refactor[web](shoppingList): better handling changes listener in prior to optimistic updates

feat[web](shoppingList): handle optimistic update for adding new product to a list
feat[web](shoppingList): add switching category for products
feat[web](shoppingList): add deleting product from shopping list
feat[web]: add generated icons for pwa

refactor[web]: separate lists to standalone components
style[web]: fix formatting and lint errors
feat[web](shoppingList): add info of left products
fix[web]: remove zooming when user enter in input on mobile

feat[web](shoppingList): expand/collapse adding product to shopping list
refactor[web]: switch square buttons to circle
fix[web](shoppingList): expand/collapse adding product to shopping list

refactor[web](shoppingList): unify the product suggestion list and category list into BaseAutocomplete
refactor[web](shoppingList): make one component for a category list item
refactor[web](shoppingList): enhance BaseAutocomplete with flexible matching logic, improve form toggle state persistence

refactor[web](shoppingList): improve BaseAutocomplete flexibility and enhance add product form functionality
- Updated BaseAutocomplete to support custom `matchBy` function and generic types. - Refactored add product form with better state management and saved preferences. - Enhanced form elements with proper attributes for accessibility and focus handling.

refactor[web](BaseAutocomplete): improve type usage and add `matchBy` prop
fix[web](shoppingList): persist state of add product form and improve UX feat[web](shoppingList): add custom product suggestion matching logic
fix[web](shoppingList): reacting on deleting item on list
fix[web](shoppingList): reacting on deleting an item from a list

feat[web](DraggableList): add animation when sort, add and remove element
refactor[web](shoppingList): enhance DraggableList typing and improve category handling logic

feat[web](DraggableList): add animations for sorting, adding, and removing items
refactor[web](shoppingList): enhance DraggableList typing and improve category handling logic
chore: update libraries

build: setup buildings types for ts as mts
build: move compose related apis to composeApp gradle file
fix[web](shoppingList): proper casting UnitEnum in groupProductsByCategoryJs
